---
title: "Finaeon"
page-layout: article
---

# Finaeon

**Provider:** United Nations

## Description

Historical financial and economic time-series database covering countries, markets, exchange rates, interest rates, commodities, inflation, and securities. Supports long-run financial and economic research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Humanities & History
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, Historical Archives, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, Historical Archives, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](http://web.library.yale.edu/access-global-financial-data)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
